commands.name: current-desktop
commands.title: Current Desktop
commands.subtitle: DesktopRenamer
commands.description: Show the currently active desktop with live status.

commands.name: toggle-space-label-windows
commands.title: Toggle Space Label Windows
commands.subtitle: DesktopRenamer
commands.description: Toggle both Active & Preview Label Windows.

commands.name: toggle-active-label-window-visibility
commands.title: Toggle Visible Label Window
commands.subtitle: DesktopRenamer
commands.description: Show/hide the Active Label Window from the desktop.

commands.name: switch-to-desktop
commands.title: Switch Desktop
commands.subtitle: DesktopRenamer
commands.description: List all desktops and switch to one

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
